channel.title: close encounters — upcoming approaches
channel.description: Near-Earth objects forecast to pass close to Earth in the next 60 days. Sourced from NASA JPL CNEOS.

item.title: 2026 JX2 — 2026-05-13 — 0.65 LD
item.description: Approach: 2026-05-13T21:51:00+00:00; distance 0.650 LD; velocity 13.8 km/s; orbit class APO
